label: Transparent citrus slice motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Citrus transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a citrus slice motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A fresh orange-grove citrus cross-section with radiant orange zest rind, translucent juicy segments, pith-cream membranes, small leaf-green stem and leaves, tiny juice vesicles, and natural rind texture. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, bright fruit freshness, no lemons as the main subject.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include a round slice, a small rind wedge, and leaves without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no whole fruit pile, no lemon-only palette, no grapefruit-only palette, no cocktail, no glass, no hand, no props, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no second plant species.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Citrus light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Citrus", derived from the visible citrus slice cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible bright service UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Citrus, Citrus Slice, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from orange zest rind, translucent juice segments, pith-cream membranes, leaf-green grove accents, rind-brown shadow, and fresh citrus highlights. The board must read as citrus slice, not generic yellow lemon or tropical fruit.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, pith-cream product surfaces, orange zest primary actions, juice-gold badges, leaf-green success states, rind-line dividers, rind ink text, subtle citrus segment and juice-vesicle texture.
Constraints: no lemon-only identity, no grapefruit-only identity, no cocktails, no tropical palm imagery, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Citrus", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Citrus dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Citrus". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the citrus slice cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Citrus, Citrus Slice, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve citrus system language: orange zest actions, juice-gold highlights, pith-cream text, leaf-green controls, rind-brown borders, segment membranes, juice-vesicle texture, 8px radius, precise shadcn/tweakcn component grid. Must read as citrus slice, not lemon-only or generic orange gradient.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: dark rind ink and toasted peel surfaces, pith-cream foreground, orange zest active states, juice-gold chart highlights, leaf green focus/control accents, rind brown borders, subtle citrus segment overlays, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no lemon-only identity, no grapefruit-only identity, no cocktail imagery, no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Citrus".
